name: yxhpy-codex-extensions
description: Public catalog of optional Codex plugins, skills, and MCP-oriented tools.

plugins.name: task-gate
plugins.summary: Generate divergent candidate ideas through local scripts when Codex is stuck, while retaining numbered task planning and the codex_gate wrapper.

plugins.name: grok-augment
plugins.summary: Use Grok as a non-mutating research, critique, creative, divergence, Grok-video-only brief, and real MP4 generation layer for Codex.

skills.name: agy-frontend
skills.summary: Frontend workflow skill that routes implementation through the Antigravity CLI and requires local verification.
